## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Runtime behavior
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Tests only

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check:docs`

## Docs and Memory Updates

- [ ] Public behavior docs updated (`README.md`, architecture docs) when applicable
- [ ] Repository governance/docs policies updated when required by `AGENTS.md`

## Risk Notes

List any safety/governance/runtime risks and mitigations.
